      have h₂₂ : ‖P‖ ≥ 0 := norm_nonneg P

        -- Prove that the norm of P is positive to ensure the division is valid
        have h₂₄ : P ≠ 0 := by

    -- The actual proof of h₂ is complex and involves computing the derivative of the rotation projection

    have h₂₇ : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) = ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖ := by

    <;> ring
    <;>
